name: ADR validator confirms an architect_session reference is present linking the ADR to a session
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0001 D1
status: accepted
deciders: [alice]
architect_session: sess-1
decision_id: d1
' > docs/adr/0001-d1.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-naming.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr --check architect-session 2>out.txt && grep -q 'architect_session=sess-1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
